final:
module JK_flip_flop(  
    input J,  
    input K,  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            Q <= 0;  
        end else begin  
            case ({J, K})  
                2'b10: Q <= 1;  // Set  
                2'b01: Q <= 0;  // Reset  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q; // Toggle  
                default: Q <= Q; // Hold  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (J && !K) begin
        Q <= 0;
      end else if (!J && K) begin
        Q <= 1;
      end else if (J && K) begin
        Q <= Q;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
